name: TWINT
description: Swiss mobile payment network; partner API for QR/merchant integrations.

seo.title: TWINT — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: TWINT: Swiss mobile payment network; partner API for QR/merchant integrations.

when_to_use: QR code payment integration for Swiss merchants via TWINT
In-store and online payment acceptance via TWINT partner API
Recurring payment setup for Swiss subscription services

pros: Effectively mandatory for Swiss consumer payments
QR flow well understood by Swiss buyers
cons: Partner API access gatekept through PSPs
review.verdict: Non-negotiable for Swiss merchants, but access is through PSP partners — you won't integrate TWINT directly alone.
review.best_for: Merchants selling in Switzerland needing local mobile payment acceptance
review.not_for: Non-Swiss merchants or teams wanting direct self-serve API access
